description: Kintex UltraScale+ FPGAs Data Sheet: DC and AC Switching Characteristics

VCCINT_IO_Standard.parameter: Internal supply voltage for the I/O banks

VCCBRAM_Standard.parameter: Block RAM and UltraRAM supply voltage

VCCO.parameter: Supply voltage for HP I/O banks and configuration bank 0

VDRINT_below_which_configuration_data.conditions: below which configuration data might be lost

VDRAUX_below_which_configuration_data.conditions: below which configuration data might be lost

M0_VDDX/VCCX.description: MIPI电压M0_VDDX和辅助电压VCCX内部短接在一起

power_integrity.desc: All power and ground pins must be connected

config_pins.desc: Mandatory config pins (MODE, JTAGSEL, RECONFIG_N) must be connected

vcco_bank_consistency.desc: All IO in same bank must use compatible IO standards sharing same VCCIO

diff_pair_integrity.desc: Differential pairs must be used together or not at all

unused_io.desc: Unused IO pins should not be left floating

jtag_pins.desc: JTAG pins (TCK/TMS/TDI/TDO) should be properly connected or have pull resistors
